patterns_recognized: Carry-thesis hard-block (f5_full_delta >= 0.15 AND hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap < 0.020) must fire unconditionally: archive shows 0-for-7 when model carry pick is maintained with near-zero bullpen gap. On 6/8 the identical SEA@BAL structure was confirmed instead of overridden and lost 6-3. OVERRIDE to Stage-1 F5-dominant side any time both conditions hold, regardless of tier or F-signal stack.

D-grade picks with SP xERA > 1.0 AGAINST the model pick reliably predicted the opposing direction across 6/5-6/8. When SP and PQI both oppose a D-grade pick, treat as a near-reliable directional negative; do not rescue or CONFIRM direction.

Near-zero HARD CAP 7 (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap in [0, 0.010)) consistently over-fires on pre-cap A-grade (score >= 4) picks with >= 3 confirming signals. Running record is heavily win-tilted in the 6/2-6/4 archive; treat gap < 0.010 as effectively neutral when pre-cap score >= 4 with F-signal + SP + PQI all confirming.

HARD CAP 1 (negative edge) is an EV gatekeeper, not a direction predictor — directional wins with negative edge are common on strong multi-signal picks (e.g., Ohtani starts). Never use a negative edge to flip direction.

PENDING_SP_DATA (< 100 Statcast pitches) validated consistently: thin-SP games produce high-variance outcomes not reliably scoreable. Maintain hard stop; single-OWNER BvP or home-field presumption is insufficient to override the protocol.

BOS @ TB.reasoning: TB pre-cap B-grade (score=2) with Stage 1/2 alignment (delta=0.04) and PQI confirmation (+10.8), but no F-signal fired to elevate to GOLD. Drew Rasmussen at home vs Jake Bennett provides a quality SP edge the grade doesn't fully capture; hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0062 (TB pen marginally better) and edge=5.52pp in-band are supportive. No carry concern (f5_full_delta=0.04). SKIP is correct — no F-signal means no GOLD elevation — but TB direction is sound for tracking.
lessons_applied: F-signal required for GOLD elevation
SKIP confirmed when pre-cap < 3 with no F-signal
no carry concern at delta=0.04

NYY @ CLE.reasoning: HARD CAPs 8 and 10 appropriately demote this pick. Edge=+3.1pp is below the 4pp staking minimum, confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue stress, and pick_prob=0.520 in the high-leak bottom bucket. Pre-cap A- with F2+SP agree is a directional indicator for NYY (Rodon), but confidence_downgrade=True plus sub-4pp edge makes this unrescuable — staking blocked by edge constraint regardless of CAP 10. CONFIRM direction only; no stake path exists.
lessons_applied: confidence_downgrade=True blocks rescue
edge < 4pp below minimum staking band
bottom-bucket 31.2% non-CONFIRM hit rate

WSH @ SF.reasoning: HARD CAP 7 fired at hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0078 (near-zero) on a pre-cap A-grade (score=5) with F2_xwoba_gap=0.029, SP edge +0.72 xERA (Griffin over Ray), PQI confirms (+12.6), Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.00). Archive shows near-zero CAP 7 (|gap| < 0.010) over-fires on pre-cap score >= 4 with multi-signal confirmation consistently (6/2-6/4). f5_full_delta=0.07 — no carry concern. Edge=7.74pp in-band. CONFIRM rescues CAP 10 to minimum-stake B-; gap of 0.0078 is economically indistinguishable from zero.
lessons_applied: near-zero CAP 7 over-fire on pre-cap A-grade
F2+SP+PQI+Stage agree = qualifying CONFIRM rescue
edge in-band 7.74pp supports minimum stake

CIN @ SD.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with SP edge 2.05 xERA AGAINST CIN (Michael King over Brady Singer) and PQI against (+28.6). Fair_prob=0.373 is an absolute block (< 0.42 threshold). Confidence_downgrade=True, f5_full_delta=0.179. Market gives CIN only 37.3% implied probability. Per archive, D-grade with SP xERA > 2.0 against the pick reliably predicts the opposing direction; CIN direction is suspect but SKIP already enforced by multiple hard gates. No rescue path.
lessons_applied: fair_prob < 0.42 absolute block
D-grade + SP xERA > 2.0 AGAINST pick = directional negative
confidence_downgrade=True blocks any rescue

SEA @ BAL.reasoning: Carry-thesis hard-block mandates OVERRIDE: f5_full_delta=0.2381 (>= 0.15) and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0031 (near-zero, < 0.020). SEA wins F5 ~60%; BAL cannot bridge that lead with a near-zero bullpen edge — the pattern that went 0-for-7 in the archive and produced an identical 6/8 SEA@BAL loss (f5_full_delta=0.303, gap=0.0007) when Claude incorrectly confirmed BAL. Compounded by D-grade (-3), SP against BAL (George Kirby 1.00 xERA over Brandon Young), and PQI against BAL (-8.8). All signals favor SEA.
lessons_applied: carry-thesis hard-block: f5_full_delta >= 0.15 + gap < 0.020 = OVERRIDE to F5-dominant side
6/8 SEA@BAL identical structure lost when confirmed
D-grade + SP against + PQI against reinforce OVERRIDE

LAD @ PIT.reasoning: Shohei Ohtani on the mound for LAD is a dominant directional signal. HARD CAP 1 fired at edge=-5.42pp — market already priced Ohtani's premium — correctly blocking stake. Pre-cap B+ (score=3) with F2_xwoba_gap=0.023 and PQI confirming LAD strongly (delta=-29.5). f5_full_delta=0.05 (no carry concern). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0054 (LAD pen marginally better). HARD CAP 1 limits to B- (no GOLD stake) but direction is sound — market disagreement on price, not direction.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 blocks staking, not direction
Ohtani as away SP is strongest available directional signal
negative edge is EV gate, not direction predictor

ARI @ MIA.reasoning: Ryan Gusto (MIA SP) has only 85 Statcast pitches season-to-date, below the 100-pitch minimum for reliable xERA scoring. PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop is correct. Archive validates this protocol consistently — thin-SP games produce extreme-variance outcomes not forecastable from other signals. No directional commitment appropriate.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA: < 100 Statcast pitches = no pick
thin-SP games are high-variance and unscoreable

PHI @ TOR.reasoning: OVERRIDE to PHI: PHI dominates F5 (60.2%, f5_full_delta=0.1931 >= 0.15) with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0093 (< 0.020) — carry-thesis conditions apply. Compounded by massive SP edge against TOR (Luzardo 3.34 xERA over small-sample Scherzer, min_pa=84), PQI overwhelming against TOR (-34.7), fair_prob=0.409 < 0.42 market rejection, and D-grade (-1). Mirrors 6/8 PHI@TOR OVERRIDE WIN (f5_full_delta=0.463, Luzardo dominant) where all signals aligned for PHI.
lessons_applied: carry-thesis hard-block: f5_full_delta >= 0.15 + gap < 0.020
SP xERA 3.34 AGAINST pick + PQI -34.7 = strong directional negative
6/8 PHI@TOR OVERRIDE WIN validated this structure
fair_prob < 0.42 market rejection of TOR

STL @ NYM.reasoning: Pre-cap score=1 (B-) with only Stage 1/2 agreement (delta=0.07) as a positive signal — no F-signal fired, no SP edge confirmed. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.015 (STL pen slightly worse than NYM, approaching 0.020 threshold). Per 6/7 archive, strong F3 + Stage alignment + pen advantage are required for minimum-stake CAP 10 rescue; F3 did not fire here and pen is mildly against the pick. SKIP is appropriate. STL direction has marginal support only.
lessons_applied: F3 must fire for qualifying CAP 10 CONFIRM rescue
pre-cap score=1 with single signal insufficient
pen gap 0.015 approaching adverse threshold

TEX @ KC.reasoning: Pre-cap A-grade (score=5) with all signals confirming TEX: F1_xera_gap=1.39* (MacKenzie Gore over Seth Lugo, thin sample noted), SP edge +1.15 xERA agrees (+2), PQI confirms (delta=-18.0), Stage 1/2 perfectly agree (delta=0.00). Staking blocked by model_prob=0.729 outside [0.48, 0.72] range and edge=+19.70pp in calibration_caution_18_25pp band. Per SOFT CAP 6.5, CONFIRM is acceptable when conviction-supported. F1* thin-sample warrants some caution but multi-signal A-grade stack is the strongest directional read on today's slate.
lessons_applied: SOFT CAP 6.5: CONFIRM acceptable in calibration_caution_18_25pp band
A-grade all-signal confirmation = highest conviction
F1* thin-sample noted but supported by SP edge +1.15 and PQI confirmation

CHC @ COL.reasoning: D-grade (-3) with SP edge 2.25 xERA AGAINST COL (Imanaga significantly over Lorenzen) and PQI -34.1 against COL. Fair_prob=0.373 < 0.42 absolute block. Coors Field altitude inflates home-team variance (per 5/29 archive), but the magnitude of Imanaga's SP edge and market rejection at fair_prob=0.373 make COL direction suspect. SKIP enforced by fair_prob gate; D-grade dual-opposing-signal direction is unreliable. COL confidence below 0.50.
lessons_applied: fair_prob < 0.42 absolute block
D-grade + Imanaga 2.25 xERA over Lorenzen = directional negative
Coors variance noted but insufficient to overcome market and SP gap

MIL @ OAK.reasoning: Pre-cap C-grade (score=0): F3_swing_take_gap=391.3 fires but PQI against (-7.0) negates it, and F3=391.3 is far below the 1000 high-conviction threshold. Confidence_downgrade=True, acute_roster stress, pick_prob=0.5163 bottom bucket. HARD CAP 10 holds — no qualifying CONFIRM rescue without strong F3 and pen advantage (per 6/7 validated filter). MIL direction has weak support; SKIP is appropriate.
lessons_applied: F3 < 1000 = insufficient for CAP 10 rescue
confidence_downgrade=True + acute_roster compound caution
pre-cap C with PQI against = no qualifying CONFIRM

HOU @ LAA.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with SP edge 1.05 xERA AGAINST HOU (Reid Detmers over Peter Lambert) and PQI against (+14.2). f5_full_delta=0.2389 large — HOU dominates F5 (70.2%) but full-game is only 53.7%. Confidence_downgrade=True, acute_roster. HOU is both Stage-1 F5-dominant AND the model pick, so no carry-thesis override applies. However D-grade + SP against + PQI against + confidence_downgrade = SKIP enforced. Direction is uncertain with dual opposing signals.
lessons_applied: D-grade + SP xERA against + PQI against = directional uncertainty
confidence_downgrade=True reinforces SKIP
carry-thesis does not apply when pick = F5-dominant side

MIN @ DET.reasoning: MIN away probable SP not yet announced. PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop is correct. No directional commitment appropriate without a scoreable SP sample meeting the 100-pitch Statcast minimum.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA: SP not announced = no pick

ATL @ CHW.reasoning: CHW home probable SP not yet announced. PENDING_SP_DATA hard stop is correct. No directional commitment appropriate until home SP is announced and meets the 100-pitch Statcast minimum for xERA scoring.
